notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Yankees challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Jarren Duran steals (12) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Austin Wells pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Wells grounds out, second baseman Anthony Seigler to first baseman Willson Contreras. Anthony Volpe scores.
